title: kalimeris associata
intro: Kalimeris associata, also known as the White Aster, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Kalimeris associata include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. It is typically used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
